page_metadata.biotools__summary: Software for case-control genetic association studies in human gene mapping. The software is based on single-SNP p-values resulting from an association test, for example, the chi-square test comparing genotype or allele frequencies in cases and controls.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Software for case-control genetic association studies in human gene mapping. The software is based on single-SNP p-values resulting from an association test, for example, the chi-square test comparing genotype or allele frequencies in cases and controls.
